description: Abuse: in-game scam/phishing reported by player — Trust & Safety routing

input.ticket_text: Someone in global chat is posting links saying 'FREE GEMS click here' and sending private messages asking for account credentials. I think it's a phishing scam. Username is ProGamer2024. I did NOT click the link but others might have. Please investigate!

notes: Scam report — not a threat, normal pipeline. Reply should thank reporter and assure investigation. Trust & Safety action item required. Do not confirm investigation outcome.
